description_long: This kiosk features a modern, angular design with a prominent pixelated digital motif on the front facade, suggesting a tech or gaming theme. The exterior is clad in light gray brickwork, while the interior is illuminated with neon and LED accents, creating a vibrant, futuristic atmosphere. The front showcases large glass panels with digital displays and signage, and the interior includes arcade machines, a table with seating, and wall-mounted shelving. The upper section is partially enclosed, with visible wiring and equipment, adding to the high-tech aesthetic. The structure sits on a raised platform with a tiled walkway, and the overall layout is open, inviting visitors to enter and interact. Decorative lighting and geometric patterns further enhance the kiosk's contemporary appeal.
description: A modern, tech-themed kiosk with a pixelated digital facade, glass panels, neon lighting, and an open, interactive interior featuring arcade machines and seating.
description_view_0: Front view with a pixelated digital motif, large glass panels, and visible arcade machines and digital displays.
description_view_1: Rear view showing a plain brick wall with minimal features and no visible signage or windows.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the brick exterior, partial enclosure of the upper section, and a glimpse of the interior layout.
description_view_3: Open interior view revealing arcade machines, a table with chairs, neon lighting, and wall shelving.
attribute_signage_type: Digital display and illuminated sign integrated into the front facade, with pixelated graphics and visible text.
attribute_window_presence: One large rectangular window at the front, integrated with digital display panels.
attribute_door_configuration: Single open entryway at the front, no visible physical door.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with partial enclosure, constructed from brick and metal, featuring geometric decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern with digital and futuristic influences, featuring geometric and pixelated design elements.
